benchmark: Jagged Frontier - Math Reasoning vs Basic Tasks
description: Tracks discrepancy between high-level mathematical reasoning (IMO, calculus) and basic arithmetic/time-telling capabilities
reference: Stanford AI Index 2026 - Jagged Frontier Analysis

gemini_deep_think.notes: IMO gold medal but 50.1% analog clock reading

gpt_4o.notes: High math reasoning, moderate basic tasks

notes: Jagged frontier: capability vs reliability gaps
Leading models can win IMO medals but fail at simple time-telling
This indicates distributional training gaps rather than true reasoning
